title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank brings to you Mortgage Loan facility to enable you to unlock the power of your property. You can mortgage your residential or commercial property to get a loan & meet all your financial requirements. 


  * Loan Amount : Up to Rs.10 Cr. Loan above Rs.10 Cr can be provided depending upon the merit of the proposal.
  * Processing Fees : 


If the applicant is not existing Home Loan /Mortgage Loan customer 
If the applicant is an existing Home Loan /Mortgage Loan customer 
* Subjected to repayment capacity of the individual as assessed by IDBI Bank Ltd.
The Following documents are required along with The Application Form to process your Loan Application.
Note: The documents mentioned above are indicative in nature. IDBI Bank may ask for additional document if required during the processing of your loan application.
  * First Charge on the mortgaged property by way of equitable mortgage against which IDBI Bank has advanced the loan.
  * Liquid Collaterals as required by The Bank selectively in the form of Pledge/Hypothecation and Assignment depending upon individual cases. 


## Attractive Interest Rates to Make Your Mortgage Loan Affordable and Convenient 
###### Schedule of charges and Terms & Conditions applicable on Mortgage Loan
